raw.title: A Repository of Hope Amid an Authoritarian Moment
raw.excerpt: The past is replete with examples of committed groups of people outside the majority that have changed the world.

llm_processed.summary: Highlights cultural and political resistance to authoritarianism, emphasizing the role of art and storytelling in fostering hope and solidarity.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Bridges to creating culturally rooted, participatory frameworks for sustainable futures.
